'''Hikahi''' was a city on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] that served as a major [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].

==History==
It was partially destroyed during the [[Battle of Calamari]], crippling [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] production. As the city was rebuilt and repopulated, it served as the base of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] after the [[Second Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
